case_title: MARK B CHERNEV VS. ANN MCFARLAND DRAPER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-22-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DRAPER, ANN MCFARLAND

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY CHERNEV, MARK B AS TO DEFENDANT DRAPER, ANN MCFARLAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERNEV, MARK B IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DRAPER, ANN MCFARLAND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
